scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix packages/client && npm install --prefix packages/server/project && npm install --prefix packages/server/task
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n project,task,client -c cyan,magenta,green "npm --prefix packages/server/project run dev" "npm --prefix packages/server/task run dev" "npm --prefix packages/client run dev"
scripts.start:all: npm run install:all && npm run dev:all
